findings: AC-1 implemented: ROUTES.dashboard(c) added to bin/keel.js:192; startDashboard() prints 'Dashboard: http://localhost:<port>' to stdout on successful listen (scripts/keel-dashboard.cjs:231)
AC-2 implemented: keel-dashboard.cjs contains zero write operations — no fs.writeFile, writeManifest, or mutating endpoints; HTTP handler is read-only

AC-3 implemented: readStories() in keel-dashboard.cjs reads manifest fields; PHASE_NAMES[phase-1] maps phase number to display label; idleTime()/formatIdle() implement conventions.md 2026-07-14 formula; sort by updated_at DESC with error rows last
AC-4 implemented: generateHTML() includes '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="30">' in <head>; animated pulse dot in header confirms live status
AC-5 implemented: parsePort(argv) in keel-dashboard.cjs:56; ctx.port = String(flags.port || '7772') in bin/keel.js:288; port shown in footer; --port=<N> in help text
AC-6 implemented: readStories() returns [] when .keel/state/ is absent; generateHTML() renders empty-state div with 'No stories found. Run keel init <story-id> to start.' when stories.length === 0

AC-7 verified: scripts/keel-state.cjs was M (modified) at session start per gitStatus context — all 419-line diff is pre-existing from prior work; this phase made zero changes to that file; confirmed via git status --short showing no new changes to keel-state.cjs

Syntax check: node -e "require('./scripts/keel-dashboard.cjs')" — all 10 exports verified present (escHtml, idleTime, formatIdle, deriveStatus, readStories, generateHTML, startDashboard, parsePort, PHASE_NAMES, SCOPES)

Functional checks: all 12 assertions passed — escHtml 5-char escaping, idleTime unknown for falsy, formatIdle Xh Ym/Xm Ys formats, formatIdle clock skew clamp, deriveStatus 3 branches, parsePort default+override, PHASE_NAMES 12 entries, generateHTML meta-refresh, empty state, story row, XSS escaping
Help output verified: node bin/keel.js --help shows 'dashboard' command and '--port=<N>' option
EADDRINUSE handler verified: Error: port 7772 is already in use message printed to stderr + exit 1 — confirmed by live test
Security: server.listen binds to '127.0.0.1' (loopback only) per ADR-003 §13.1 — LAN exposure prevented

Test intelligence for phase 6: escHtml 5-char set, idleTime falsy→unknown, formatIdle ≥3600000 vs <3600000 vs negative, deriveStatus halted/complete/in-progress, readStories missing dir/missing manifest/.lock skip/malformed JSON/sort order, generateHTML meta-refresh/empty/table/badge colors/XSS, startDashboard 127.0.0.1 bind/stdout startup/GET 200/non-root 404/EADDRINUSE exit 1
decisions: Dashboard implemented as new scripts/keel-dashboard.cjs (CJS) per ADR-003 — 300+ line HTML generator + HTTP lifecycle isolated from bin/keel.js CLI dispatcher
main() called at bottom of module (entry-point pattern); module.exports exposes all functions for CJS test harness without starting the server separately
formatIdle called with Math.max(0, ms) to clamp negative clock-skew values — prevents '-1m 0s' display for future updated_at timestamps
PHASE_NAMES and SCOPES duplicated from keel-state.cjs — not shared, to preserve AC-7 zero-touch guarantee on keel-state.cjs
Error StoryRows sorted last (not first) — operator sees healthy stories first, errors are secondary; consistent with architect decision in 04-solution-architect.json
